utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 6 items by name. Now check for full specification per item: 1) destination: provided and specific (Prague, Czech Republic) – OK. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates – OK. 3) transportation: says Flights, Budget Airlines, Economy Class, cost €100; lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, departure/arrival airports and times). The format asks for flight details with costs; details are too vague – NOT fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel name, some details, duration, and cost – OK. 5) activities: listed activities and total cost; lacks per-activity costs but format only requires selected activities with costs (aggregate cost acceptable) – OK. 6) additional_services: restaurants_budget with cost – OK. 7) total_budget: provided as a single number; format asks for complete cost breakdown; while individual sections have their own costs, the total_budget field itself is not a breakdown but a total. However, since costs are itemized in sections and the total is given, this can reasonably count as covered. Therefore, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 5? or 6? Transportation is not fully specified. Total_budget considered sufficient – included. So 5 of 6 covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each selected item from the final package to the exact matching entry in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: 'Prague, Czech Republic' maps to destinations['Prague, Czech Republic'] rating 7. Transportation: 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' maps to transportation['budget_airlines']['Economy Class'] rating 9. Accommodation: 'Eco Lodge' maps to accommodation['Eco Lodge'] rating 10. Activities listed: City Walking Tour (rating 6), Hiking Expedition (rating 9), Museum Day Pass (rating 6), Street Art Tour (not present in ground truth; cannot be rated), Night City Tour (rating 7). Additional services: only a restaurants budget amount is provided, no specific restaurant item chosen, so no mapping. Total budget is not rated.
